info.title: Insolvency Register
info.description:
The Insolvency Register API allows authorised users to retrieve information from public [insolvency and debt repayment order registers](http://www.insolvency.govt.nz/).

See [here](/api/insolvency-register) for additional information on how to use the API.

get.summary: Returns the public information for the estate of a personal insolvency or liquidation
get.description:
### Overview
  Returns the public information for the estate of a personal or company insolvency

  ____
  ### Pre-conditions
  * API user is authenticated
  ____
  ### Post-conditions
  * Insolvency record is returned

  ### HATEOAS "links" element examples
  | Case \# | Case | Description / rules |
  |----|-----|------|
  | **1** | **200: OK** | Self |

  ____
  ### SOAP Mapping
  | SOAP XML object| Description|
  |----|------|
  | personalInsolvencyDetail |  Close but not exact mapping |
  | companyInsolvencyDetail |  Close but not exact mapping |

parameters.name: estate-id
parameters.description: Format - int64. * The unique identifier for the estate.

200.description: The get result for a given estate-id.

date.description: Response parameter. Date/time the response was generated (in Greenwich mean time).

service-version.description: The minor version of the API.

403.description: The requester is not authorised to perform this operation.

500.description: An unexpected internal server error occurred.

get.summary: Public search for an insolvent estate
get.description:
**Search the public register for an insolvent estate

* Only public data is returned

parameters.name: estate-number
parameters.description: * Number or part number of the estate. Estate-number is the unique primary id.

parameters.name: insolvencyTypeDescription
parameters.description:
Enum, one of;
  - Creditor Application
  - Debtor Application
  - No Asset Procedure
  - Partnership
  - Insolvent Deceased Estate
  - Bankrupt Agency
  - Debt Repayment Order
  - Receiver Manager (Bankrupt)
  - Voluntary Liquidation
  - Court Liquidation
  - Voluntary Administration
  - Interim Liquidation
  - Liquidation Agency
  - Criminal Asset Management

parameters.name: name
parameters.description: * Name or part name of the person / company.

parameters.name: nzbn
parameters.description: * NZBN number or part NZBN number for the insolvent party.

parameters.name: register
parameters.description: * Specify search against either DRO or Insolvency register

parameters.name: date-to
parameters.description: * End date search range for insolvencies. Effect of not specifying will be to "default" to today. * Format = YYYY-MM-DD adjudication date to

parameters.name: page
parameters.description: The page in the collection to return. Default is page 1.

parameters.name: page-size
parameters.description:
The requested number of items to include in each page returned.
Default is 20.

parameters.name: sort-order
parameters.description: The order to sort the collection in. Can be 'ASC' or 'DESC'.

parameters.name: sort-by
parameters.description: The property to sort the collection by.

200.description: The search results for the given provider search parameters.

date.description: Response parameter. Date/time the response was generated (in Greenwich mean time).

service-version.description: The minor version of the API.

400.description: The combination of search enquiry parameters is invalid.

example.errorDescription: An unexpected error occurred servicing the request.

403.description: The requester is not authorised for this operation.

500.description: An unexpected internal server error occurred.

example.errorDescription: An unexpected error occurred servicing the request.

get.summary: Public search for an insolvent records to be removed from the register
get.description:
**All the records that have been removed from the register within a specific time period.

* Deliberately only provides EstateIds / resource links so as to avoid unintentionally becoming a second register of removed insolvent estates.

* Only public data should is returned

parameters.name: date-from
parameters.description:
* Date search range to list removals from. Set this to the last time it was called by the API user. The purpose is to give a slice of insolvencies that need to be removed since the last time this operation was called.
* Format = YYYY-MM-DD

parameters.name: date-to
parameters.description:
* Date search range to list removals to. In effect "defaults" to today if not specified. If specified, cannot be more than 3 months from date-from.
* Format =  YYYY-MM-DD

parameters.name: page
parameters.description: The page in the collection to return. Default is page 1.

parameters.name: page-size
parameters.description:
The requested number of items to include in each page returned.
Default is 1000.

parameters.name: sort-order
parameters.description: The order to sort the collection in. Can be 'ASC' or 'DESC'.

parameters.name: sort-by
parameters.description: The property to sort the collection by e.g. estateNumber or estateName

200.description: The search results for the given provider search parameters.

date.description: Response parameter. Date/time the response was generated (in Greenwich mean time).

service-version.description: The minor version of the API.

400.description: The combination of search enquiry parameters is invalid.

example.errorDescription: An unexpected error occurred servicing the request.

403.description: The requester is not authorised for this operation.

500.description: An unexpected internal server error occurred.

example.errorDescription: An unexpected error occurred servicing the request.

estateNumber.description:
The primary identifier for the insolvency record.
LegacyAPIMapping - baseInsolvencyDetail.insolvencyNumber

estateName.description: The name of the insolvent party. LegacyAPIMapping - personalInsolvencyDetail.debtorName

organisationName.description: If the party is NOT human, the name of the organisation / company.

created.description:
Date created (Personal) or Liquidation (Company)
LegacyAPIMapping - baseInsolvencyDetail.date

nzbn.description:
The NZBN of the insolvent party if known.
LegacyAPIMapping - new

companyNumber.description:
The Company number of the insolvent party.
LegacyAPIMapping - baseInsolvencyDetail.companyNumber

monthOfBirth.description:
The month the insolvent party was born.
LegacyAPIMapping - personalInsolvencyDetail.monthOfBirth

yearOfBirth.description:
The year the insolvent party was born.
LegacyAPIMapping - personalInsolvencyDetail.yearOfBirth

employmentStatusAtAdjudication.description:
The employment status at the time the insolvency was adjudicated.
LegacyAPIMapping - personalInsolvencyDetail.employmentStatusAtAdjudication.

partneredEstates.description:
A list of links to estates related to this insolvency.
LegacyAPIMapping - baseInsolvencyDetail.partneredEstates

adjudicationOrLiquidationDate.description:
Date adjudicated (Personal) or Liquidation (Company)
LegacyAPIMapping - baseInsolvencyDetail.adjudicationDateTime

insolvencyTypeDescription.description:
Public-facing version of insolvency type. Only applies to public insolvency types.
LegacyAPIMapping - baseInsolvencyDetail.insolvencyType

multipleInsolvencies.description:
Indicates that the debtor has had multiple insolvencies.
LegacyAPIMapping - baseInsolvencyDetail.multipleInsolvencies

tradingNames.description:
Trading names of the estate.
LegacyAPIMapping - activeInsolvencyDetail.tradingNames

alternateNames.description:
Alternate names of the estate.
LegacyAPIMapping - activeInsolvencyDetail.alternateNames

occupationAtAdjudicationOrIndustryAtLiqu.description:
The occuption of the insolvent at the time of adjudication.
LegacyAPIMapping - activeInsolvencyDetail.occupationAtAdjudication

addressAtAdjudication.description:
The address of the insolvent at the time of adjudication
LegacyAPIMapping - activeInsolvencyDetail.addressAtAdjudication

insolvencyStatus.description:
Public-facing version of insolvency status - actaully discharge status.
LegacyAPIMapping - activeInsolvencyDetail.insolvencyStatus
Currently Bankrupt/NAP (Conditional) Discharged Annulled Currently In Liquidation Completed Liquidation Terminated
In addition "Current" for DRO, "Removed" to indicate removed insolvency.

removedDate.description: The date when the insolvency was removed, applicable only when insolvencyStatus is Removed.

dischargeOrCompletionDate.description:
Discharge date (for Personal insolvencies) or Completion date (for Company insolvencies)
LegacyAPIMapping - activeInsolvencyDetail.dischargeDate

dischargeSuspended.description:
Indicates if the discharge has been suspended.
LegacyAPIMapping - activeInsolvencyDetail.dischargeSuspended

dischargeOrCompletionConditions.description:
Discharge conditions (for Personal insolvencies) or Completion conditions (for Company insolvencies)
LegacyAPIMapping - activeInsolvencyDetail.dischargeConditions

currentAddresses.description:
For NAP, DRO or Debtor Application only, if supplied address from the contact record exists then this is used, otherwise the adjudication address in the estate record is used. For all other estate types, the adjudication address from the estate record is always used.
LegacyAPIMapping - activeInsolvencyDetail.currentAddresses

href.description: Specifies the URL of the resource the link goes to

InsolvenciesRecord.description:
Public insolvency detail
If insolvencyStatus is Removed then all fields will be suppressed except
estateNumber, removedDate and insolvencyStatus.

InsolvenciesSearchResults.description: Paged collection of the results returned

estateNumber.description:
The primary identifier for the insolvency record.
LegacyAPIMapping - baseInsolvencyDetail.insolvencyNumber

estateName.description: The name of the insolvent party. LegacyAPIMapping - personalInsolvencyDetail.debtorName

nzbn.description:
The NZBN of the insolvent party if known.
LegacyAPIMapping - new

adjudicationOrLiquidationDate.description:
Date adjudicated (Personal) or Liquidation (Company)
LegacyAPIMapping - baseInsolvencyDetail.adjudicationDateTime

insolvencyTypeDescription.description:
Public-facing version of insolvency type. Only applies to public insolvency types.
LegacyAPIMapping - baseInsolvencyDetail.insolvencyType

multipleInsolvencies.description:
Indicates that the debtor has had multiple insolvencies.
LegacyAPIMapping - baseInsolvencyDetail.multipleInsolvencies

addressAtAdjudication.description:
The address of the insolvent at the time of adjudication
LegacyAPIMapping - activeInsolvencyDetail.addressAtAdjudication

insolvencyStatus.description:
Public-facing version of insolvency status - actaully discharge status.
LegacyAPIMapping - activeInsolvencyDetail.insolvencyStatus
Currently Bankrupt/NAP (Conditional) Discharged Annulled Currently In Liquidation Completed Liquidation Terminated

alternateNames.description:
Alternate names of the estate.
LegacyAPIMapping - activeInsolvencyDetail.alternateNames

InsolvenciesSearchResult.description: Paged collection of the results returned

RemovedOrCorrectedInsolvenciesResults.description: Paged collection of the results returned

errorDescription.example: An unexpected error occurred servicing the request.

href.description: Specifies the URL of the resource the link goes to

estateNumber.description: The identifier of the linked estate

EstateLink.description: JSON representation of the ATOM pub link format

rel.description:
The rel attribute specifies the relationship between the current
resource and the linked resource.

href.description: Specifies the URL of the resource the link goes to

action.description: Specifies the action which can be performed

Link.description: JSON representation of the ATOM pub link format

streetNumber.description: Street number - could concatenate sub unit information.

streetName.description: Concatenation of street name and street type

country.description: Country address is in if supplied

AddressRecord.description: Most often a street address. Not guaranteed to be PAF compliant, but most often will be.

office.description: The insolvency office dealing with the estate.

insolvencyOfficer.description: The current insolvency officer dealing with the estate.

OfficeRecord.description: Most often a street address. Not guaranteed to be PAF compliant, but most often will be.

firstName.description: If the party is human, the first name of the party.

middleName.description: If the party is human, the middle name of the party.

lastName.description: If the party is human, the last name / surname of the party.

NameRecord.description: Used to return the name of a person or organisation related to the insolvency

DroSupervisorRecord.description: DRO Supervior contact details applicable only for Debt Repayment Order estate types

sortBy.description:
The property the collection is sorted on. This is optional and may not
be supported by all collections

sortOrder.description:
The order the collection is sorted in. This is optional and may not be
supported by all collections. Valid values are 'ASC', 'DESC'

totalItems.description: The total number of results/items in this collection

pageSize.description: The number of results/items returned per page of results

totalPages.description:
The number of pages in the collection given the current pageSize.
Note this will have the value ceiling(totalItems / pageSize).

CollectionMetadata.description: Metadata associated with a paginated collection

tags.name: RegisterSearch
tags.description: Search for and retrieve records from Insolvency and DRO registers.

tags.name: Removals
tags.description: Corrections annulments and removals from the register.
